title: Developer generates local embeddings
story: As an internal developer, I want to generate embeddings from my local working copy so that Claude has accurate context for my module while I code.
acceptance_criteria: CLI command produces .emb package from current working copy
Incremental mode only re-embeds changed files
Package auto-loads into local MCP server
Works with both Git and SVN working copies

title: Customer queries shipped embeddings
story: As a customer developer, I want to query pre-built embeddings of the product so that I can find the right classes and patterns for my extensions without needing source code access.
acceptance_criteria: MCP server loads shipped .emb packages on startup
Query returns relevant class signatures and extension points
Results come from Interface-tier content (no source code exposed)
Response within 2 seconds

title: Release engineer publishes embeddings
story: As a release engineer, I want the CI/CD pipeline to automatically generate and publish embedding packages alongside product releases so that customers always have up-to-date embeddings.
acceptance_criteria: Jenkins/GH Actions pipeline generates embeddings per module in parallel
Content redaction produces Interface and Guided tier variants
Packages published to Artifactory/Nexus after successful build
Release bundle validates cross-module compatibility

title: Customer receives embedding updates
story: As a customer developer, I want to receive updated embeddings when new product versions are released so that my context stays current.
acceptance_criteria: Update checker identifies compatible newer versions
Downloads validate checksums before replacing local packages
Previous version retained until new version verified
Incompatible versions rejected with clear error

title: Cross-module semantic search
story: As a developer working on Order Management, I want to search across all modules so that I can understand how Inventory Management handles stock reservations that my module depends on.
acceptance_criteria: Query orchestrator fans out to relevant module stores
Results merged and ranked across modules
Partial results returned if some modules timeout
Module registry routes queries to relevant domains

title: Security team approves embedding distribution
story: As a security reviewer, I want to verify that shipped embeddings cannot be used to reconstruct source code so that our IP is protected.
acceptance_criteria: Interface-tier embeddings contain only public signatures
Guided-tier adds summaries but no raw source
Packages encrypted with per-module AES-256-GCM keys
Tier is set at generation and immutable after

title: Developer uses cloud embedding model
story: As a developer with API access, I want to use Voyage-code-3 for higher quality embeddings so that my semantic search results are more accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Cloud model configurable via API key in settings
Model selection configurable per-module
Indexes are model-specific (dimensions tracked in manifest)
Fallback to CodeBERT if cloud model unavailable

title: iSDLC agent uses semantic search
story: As an iSDLC agent performing code analysis, I want semantic search available as a modality so that I can find code by meaning rather than exact text match.
acceptance_criteria: Semantic backend registered in search registry
Router routes modality:semantic queries to backend
Falls back to grep-glob if MCP server unavailable
Health check reports server status

title: Developer installs semantic search toolchain
story: As a developer setting up the iSDLC framework, I want the installer to automatically provision the semantic search toolchain so that I can generate and query embeddings without manual dependency management.
acceptance_criteria: isdlc init / isdlc update installs Tree-sitter and language grammars
CodeBERT ONNX model downloaded with progress indicator and checksum verification
faiss-node and better-sqlite3 native bindings installed for the current platform
Docker image pulled for MCP server (skipped gracefully if Docker unavailable)
Partial installation allows embedding generation without Docker
Installer is idempotent — re-running skips already-installed components
Platform-specific prebuilt binaries used where available (macOS, Linux, Windows)
Clear error messages with manual installation instructions on failure

title: Developer triggers embedding generation during discovery
story: As a developer running project discovery on an existing codebase, I want embeddings to be generated automatically so that semantic search is available from the first Claude session after setup.
acceptance_criteria: Before-discovery mode generates flat embeddings from the full source tree
During-discovery mode runs embedding generation in parallel with architecture analysis
After-discovery mode re-partitions embeddings into module-aware indexes using discovery output
Upgrade from flat to module-partitioned reuses existing chunk and vector data
Generated packages auto-load into the local MCP server
Progress reported during generation (files processed, time remaining)
Discovery proceeds even if embedding generation fails (non-blocking)
User can choose trigger timing or skip embedding generation entirely
